vaccines.name: Hepatitis A
vaccines.dose: Inactivated: 2 doses 1 ml (6 months apart) OR Live attenuated: 1 dose 0.5 ml

vaccines.name: Pneumococcal
vaccines.dose: 1 dose PCV20 OR PCV13 followed by PPSV23 1 year later
vaccines.booster: PPSV23 booster after 5 years (maximum 2 doses: one before 65 years, one after 65 years)

kidney.label: Chronic Kidney Disease / Haemodialysis / Nephrotic Syndrome

vaccines.name: Hepatitis A
vaccines.dose: Inactivated: 2 doses 1 ml (6 months apart) OR Live attenuated: 1 dose 0.5 ml

vaccines.name: HPV
vaccines.dose: Female ≤26 yr: 2 or 3 doses; Male ≤21 yr: 2 or 4 doses

vaccines.name: Pneumococcal
vaccines.dose: 1 dose PCV20 OR PCV13 followed by PPSV23 8 weeks later
vaccines.booster: PPSV23 booster after 5 years (maximum 2 doses: one before 65 years, one after 65 years)
vaccines.notes: Note: PPSV23 given 8 weeks after PCV (not 1 year as in other conditions)

vaccines.name: Tdap
vaccines.dose: 1 dose before chemo; 1 dose minimum 3 months after chemo

vaccines.name: Pneumococcal
vaccines.dose: 1 dose PCV20 OR PCV13 followed by PPSV23 8 weeks later
vaccines.notes: Give at least 2 weeks before chemo OR minimum 3 months after chemo

vaccines.name: Hib
vaccines.dose: 1 dose before chemo; 1 dose at least 3 months after chemo

vaccines.name: MMR
vaccines.notes: After therapy only (live vaccine — avoid before/during chemo)

vaccines.name: Varicella
vaccines.notes: After therapy only (live vaccine — avoid before/during chemo)

vaccines.name: Hepatitis E

vaccines.name: Japanese Encephalitis
vaccines.schedule: Extended stay >1 month in rural/agricultural areas, especially during monsoon season

vaccines.name: Yellow Fever
vaccines.schedule: Mandatory for travellers from Africa and South America
